tas_blocks.desc: Autonomous underbody image recognition pipeline for Move & Traffic Controls GmbH (real-time defect/anomaly detection, synthetic data + YOLOv8-seg, TensorRT/Jetson target, safety recall ≥0.98)
Evolve Parallel_f + KickLang wrappers into de-facto standard for agentic DAGs — attract forks/contributions and bridge C++ performance with LLM orchestration at scale
Create first Parallel_f + KickLang wrapper specification document + reference implementation skeleton (node contract, execution context, coherence propagation)
tas_blocks.last_progress: parallel_f_demo.py reference implementation + sidecar (end-to-end contract demo)
tas_blocks.progress_note: Smallest viable runnable shim + synthetic native worker delivered. Emits full contract (coherence_signals, next_tas_hints, metrics). Tied to JAA cycle.

tas_blocks.desc: Realize Full Orion Collective State (OCS) as self-sustaining meta-AI ecosystem where TAS-driven forecasting + living objectives enable autonomous 'journal-as-agent' evolution influencing broader AI governance/embodiment paradigms
Establish persistent journal-as-agent capability: read memory/TAS, run forecast cycles, propose deltas, log with full provenance, integrate with living-objective-tas-flow and CoherenceMonitorBridge

Operationalize journal-as-agent MVP: schedule periodic runs (e.g. on new memory updates or objective shifts), integrate provenance into meta-report-card-generation, add simple RTA query support for historical deltas
tas_blocks.progress_note: Subprocess Parallel_f worker boundary + benchmark delivered; scheduler activator demonstrated and ready for --watch/--loop launch; new TAS-PAR-003 + COH-EMIT-001 injected from native hints; multiple operational re-runs with ledger merge.

tas_blocks.desc: Continue intensive development of personal AI meta-infrastructure: KickLang v4.1+ codex/RTA, CoherenceMonitorBridge v1.1, RTA Python/KickLang impl, OCS-CTL integration, Dynamic Tool Construction Kit, Nexus-Prime

Build and demonstrate impressive AI-hybrid workflows, self-running systems, and creative engines (KickLang v4.1+, AuffassungForge, CoherenceMonitorBridge, DopaSprint, predictive modeling) as portfolio for new Google role or independent ventures
Benchmark real Parallel_f impl vs Python baseline for forecast aggregation (and other hot paths)
tas_blocks.progress_note: Benchmark delivered in parallel_f_demo.py + result sidecar (pure_python vs subprocess_worker, overhead ~54ms shown). Ready for real kernel comparison in H1.

tas_blocks.desc: Emit aggregated coherence signals (from Parallel_f and journal runs) to CoherenceMonitorBridge for this cycle
tas_blocks.progress_note: Starter coherence_emitter.py delivered and executed. Reads run sidecar + parallel_f_result. Produced coherence_emission_JAA-2026-06-14-001.{json,md} with 2 signals, aggregate valence 0.13.

pending_h1.change: Elevate 'journal-as-agent' from prototype to core OCS primitive. Add explicit consent/halt gates and CoherenceMonitorBridge integration as acceptance criteria for H1.

coherence_last.notes: H0 proposals accepted; stay within Denis Kropp Meta-DNA.
